title: Mitigate the Thundering Herd Problem
description: Architect 'Jittered Reconnect' strategies to prevent the Thundering Herd Problem. Mitigate massive CPU and memory spikes following server-wide socket disconnects.
objectives: Architect 'Jittered Reconnect' strategies to prevent the Thundering Herd Problem.
Mitigate massive CPU and memory spikes following server-wide socket disconnects.
